data.title: Tractor Supply offers stress-free holiday shopping with gifts, gear, and decor at unbeatable prices. #TSCO #Holiday|#WintrySeason
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO) is offering a wide range of gifts, gear, and décor for holiday gatherings and winter supplies at unbeatably low prices. As the largest rural lifestyle retailer in the United States, they cater to customers looking for last-minute deals and convenience in shopping. With various shopping options available, Tractor Supply ensures customers have everything they need for the cold months ahead.

data.title: Bay Area Robotics Association (BARA) connects corporates, roboticists, investors, and startups in Silicon Valley.
data.description: A new platform, the Bay Area Robotics Association (BARA), has been launched in Silicon Valley, California. This industry organization is member-driven and aims to connect corporates, roboticists, investors, and startups in the region. BARA serves as a hub for collaboration and networking within the robotics sector, facilitating partnerships and innovation. The association is set to play a significant role in fostering growth and advancement in the industry.

data.title: Mamba Brand CEO urges national hemp accountability amid rising legal concerns, stressing need for industry standards.
data.description: In Los Angeles on December 12, 2025, Dino Awadisian, the CEO of The Mamba Brand, a prominent figure in the hemp industry, has called for the implementation of uniform regulations for hemp production in the United States. Amid increasing legal ambiguity and growing public unease, Awadisian emphasized the necessity of establishing consistent guidelines. The proposal aims to address the current issues prevalent within the hemp market, with specific attention to legal uncertainties. Initiating nationwide standards for hemp manufacturing is intended to provide clarity and facilitate smoother operations within the industry. The request underscores mounting pressure on policymakers and businesses to take decisive action in ensuring a more regulated framework. This call for a standardized approach comes at a crucial juncture where the industry is witnessing escalating concerns and challenges, indicating the potential benefits of a unified regulatory system.

data.title: UAE online pet grooming retail market to reach USD 150 million by 2030, driven by increasing pet ownership and e-commerce.
data.description: A report on the UAE online pet grooming products retail market has been released, now available for review. The market, currently valued at USD 150 million, is experiencing significant growth driven by factors such as growing pet ownership, increasing incomes, and the adoption of e-commerce. Leading this trend are major cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi, benefitting from high population density and a consumer base with a strong focus on pet-related products. The market outlook covers the period from 2025 to 2030, highlighting trends, opportunities, and growth drivers.

data.title: Nasdaq drops 2% as Broadcom sell-off hits AI sector, Dow Jones index declines on Friday.
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a downturn, with the Dow Jones index sliding. AI stocks were particularly impacted, with Broadcom stock witnessing a significant drop after their earnings report. The Nasdaq slumped by 2%, reflecting the overall negative trend. This sell-off in Broadcom has had a direct impact on the AI sector. Market analysts closely followed the developments as they unfolded live throughout the day.

data.title: Photography awards & sharing session at Palace Museum showcase mobile imaging as catalyst for cultural exchange.
data.description: The "2025 Foreign Diplomats' Tour of the Forbidden City" program included the recent "Capture the Splendor of the Forbidden City—Diplomats' Photography Award Ceremony and Image Sharing Session" held on December 9 in Beijing. Hosted at the Palace Museum, this event marked a successful gathering where diplomats showcased their photography skills.

data.title: Sangha Renewables launches 20 MW project in West Texas powered by TotalEnergies, focusing on bitcoin mining.
data.description: Sangha Renewables has established a data center in Odessa, Texas on December 12, 2025, allowing them to capitalize on renewable energy through bitcoin mining. This move provides a scalable model for the company, showcasing their innovative approach to generating renewable energy. Sangha Renewables is redefining the sector by combining bitcoin mining with institutional-grade project initiatives, demonstrating their commitment to sustainability and technological advancement.

data.title: LiveOnNY hosts record-breaking Painted Legacy event in the Bronx, honoring donor heroes through art. NEW YORK, Dec. 12, 2025.
data.description: A program called Painted Legacy is uniting donor families, recipients, and advocates to turn photographs of departed loved ones into special pieces of art that pay tribute to the generosity of life donation. The initiative, based in New York, was launched on December 12, 2025. LiveOnNY, the official organ procurement organization (OPO) for the state, is leading this effort.

data.title: Jeep introduces Wrangler Whitecap, 2nd exclusive model in yearlong Twelve 4 Twelve series celebrating 85 years of off-road leadership.
data.description: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on December 12, 2025, the second special-edition Wrangler model was unveiled by the Jeep brand as part of the Twelve 4 Twelve series. This model showcases a Heritage-inspired design with a Bright White painted hardtop and grille. It is exclusively available on Sahara and Rubicon trims. Orders for this special edition Wrangler are now open.

data.title: Monotype & Bruce Mau Design collaborate to reimagine climate future through design, part of Monotype's Re:Vision campaign.
data.description: Monotype's collaboration with Bruce Mau Design, spearheaded by Executive Creative Director Phil Garnham, aims to explore potential futures through design to promote climate optimism and action. The project, part of Monotype's Re:Vision campaign, focuses on addressing challenges and solutions.

data.title: Dr. Jeffrey Miller appointed as Dean of College of Engineering at Embry-Riddle's Prescott Campus.
data.description: In Prescott, Arizona on December 12, 2025, Dr. Jeffrey Miller, a distinguished academic leader in engineering and computer science, was selected as the new dean of the College of Engineering at Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University. Dr. Miller brings a wealth of experience and expertise to his new role at the Prescott campus.

data.title: Decorated combat soldier Roy E. Spicer retires from the Veterans Consortium Pro Bono Program after serving on the board of directors.
data.description: In a recent statement, the Veterans Consortium Pro Bono Program disclosed that Roy E. Spicer from Disabled American Veterans (DAV) will retire from the nonprofit's board of directors at the close of 2025. This decision was confirmed in Washington on Dec. 12, 2025. Spicer's departure marks a significant change for the organization, as he has been a key member contributing to its mission. For more information, individuals can visit vetsprobono.org.
ADP does not predict NFP precisely. But it often gets the direction right and highlights sector-level labor trends early. With limited data ahead of the FOMC, markets still have to pay attention.

data.title: Oman cloud-based fleet management software market valued at USD 150 million, driven by demand for efficiency and cost reduction.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Oman cloud-based fleet management software market has been released. The market is currently valued at USD 150 million with a forecasted growth up to 2030. This growth is attributed to the rising need for operational efficiency, cost reduction, and improved fleet visibility in Oman. The adoption of cloud technology allows for real-time data access and analytics, providing crucial insights for fleet management. This market analysis highlights the trends, opportunities, competitive landscape, and growth drivers influencing the Oman cloud-based fleet management software market.
